subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Render thanks unto the Ever-Living, the Self-Subsisting, for He hath distinguished thee amidst the assembly of beings and hath crowned thee with the diadem [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله شکر کن حی قیومیرا که ترا از بین ربات حجال امتیاز داده و بتاج
